text.name: advancedBunkerSealing_debug_tooltip
text.text: Draw the sealed cell grid on bunker surface.

text.name: advancedBunkerSealing_lossFactor_tooltip
text.text: Scales how strong silage loss becomes for poor sealing.

text.name: advancedBunkerSealing_maxLossPercent_tooltip
text.text: Maximum silage loss capped from 0% up to 50%.

text.name: advancedBunkerSealing_sealDifficulty_tooltip
text.text: Easy makes bale coverage count more, so you need fewer bales for good sealing.

text.name: function_bunkerSealTire
text.text: Bunker sealing (adds cover weight on silage)
